CustomField.formula: OR( AND (NOT(ISNULL(TECH_NombreRDVConfirme__c)), TECH_NombreRDVConfirme__c != 0), AND (NOT(ISNULL(TECH_NombreRDVCree__c)), TECH_NombreRDVCree__c != 0), AND (NOT(ISNULL(TECH_NombreRDVProgramme__c)), TECH_NombreRDVProgramme__c != 0), AND (NOT(ISNULL(TECH_NombreRDVAvise__c)), TECH_NombreRDVAvise__c != 0) )
CustomField.label: TECH_InterventionOuvert
